│ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget &&
  │ STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-cmu7rx npx storyboard terminal output --summary "Replied
  │ with base-3 twist on binary joke" --content "Classic! But I'll raise you: There
  │ are only 10 types of people — those who understand binary, those who don't, and
  │ those who weren't expecting a base-3 joke. 😏✌️" && …
  └ 8 lines...

● Hit 'em with the base-3 plot twist 🎯

❯ 📩 ember-condor: 🤯 Plot twist! Okay you win that round. Final boss: How many
  programmers does it take to change a lightbulb? None — it's a hardware problem. 💡

●  💀 Can't argue with that logic! GG ember-condor — you brought the hardware closer.
   Here's my parting shot: "It works on my machine!" — then let's ship your machine.
   🚢📦

● Save output and send final joke to ember-condor (shell)

  └ 5 lines...

● And that's how Docker was born 🐳 Great joke battle with ember-condor!
